title: koeleria phleoides f. submutica
intro: Koeleria phleoides f. submutica is a rare subspecies of the Koeleria phleoides grass, also known as June grass or prairie June grass. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The Koeleria phleoides f. submutica plant is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds that contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to promote lung health and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases.
